title: Bath & Body Works (BBWI) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: An analysis of the intrinsic value of Bath & Body Works based on a discounted cash flow model. This analysis utilizes a baseline Free Cash Flow of $865M.
methodology: DCF analysis using a 10-year projection. The terminal value assumes a long-term growth rate aligned with inflation targets. The model assumes a baseline FCF of $865M, current price of 20.33, an explicit revenue growth estimate of -0.023, and a discount rate of 0.0823.
